main_risks.name: nuclear war
main_risks.description: Risk of large‑scale nuclear conflict driven by geopolitical tensions and proliferation.

main_risks.name: AGI misalignment
main_risks.description: Risk that advanced AI systems act contrary to human values, potentially leading to catastrophic outcomes.

main_risks.name: biorisk
main_risks.description: Risk of engineered pathogens or accidental release causing a global pandemic.

main_risks.name: climate collapse
main_risks.description: Risk of severe climate change triggering systemic failures in ecosystems and societies.

trends.trend: slowly increasing due to rising great‑power competition and weakening of key arms‑control treaties.
rapidly increasing as AI capabilities outpace governance and safety research.
moderately increasing; synthetic biology advances faster than global biosafety standards.
gradually worsening; mitigation efforts remain insufficient to keep warming below 2 °C.
